title: Command Whitelist
description: A command whitelist for default (Non-OP) players
body:
Adds a command whitelist for non-OP players.
Meant to be used as a simple permissions system.

Usable commands are set using the config file.
**MOST** commands are removed from tab auto-complete.

_Message you get when trying to use a non-whitelisted command:_

![Console message.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db2ac53f3376b94b8902483d1ac2992c27b6b51c.png)
